summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) People & Talent professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact—always improving the candidate and people experience.

bullets.text: Upskill HR team in {data|data analytics} to audit 300+ leave cases, successfully refuting cost assumptions via {data|evidence-based insights}
Empower HR to present executive-ready insights on $362K in leave costs, leading to policy redesigns and first aid training
Coordinate {coord|program logistics and operations} for 20+ programs across {cross|Marketing, Tech, and Sales teams}, managing multiple workstreams under tight timelines
Maintain {tools|ATS (Greenhouse)} and enrollment {data|data accuracy}, gathering {data|metrics} that keep stakeholders on target
Establish {coord|documentation and SOPs} for 70+ staff, reducing onboarding time by 75%
Facilitate webinars for 600+ participants, refining {cross|communication strategies} and achieving a 78% program enrollment rate
Analyzed 2,000+ employee experiences to amplify employee voice and guide C-suite decisions on satisfaction drivers
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed engagement strategies
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Improved {ex|employee experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects focusing on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Coordinated interview schedules and {cross|senior-leadership communications} across employee relations, headcount, and succession planning
Supported HRBP team by piloting an Inclusive Leadership workshop for senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations
Optimized onboarding across 3 global locations via process analysis and clarified job responsibilities
Strengthened {ex|engagement} via an HR newsletter and award-winning well-being initiatives, recognized among 1,000+ competitors
Coordinated a high volume of recruiting touchpoints, drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation details
Delivered a best-in-class {ex|candidate experience} via personalized communication and service, lifting applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants
Developed proficiency across HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management

InGenius → coordination/logistics/operations, Greenhouse ATS + metrics/data accuracy, documentation/SOPs, communication strategies. Vestas → led with interview scheduling + senior-leadership comms (JD wants C-suite scheduling). Kronos → led with recruiting coordination + best-in-class candidate experience.
